soft.high_vol_caution: ATR ratio > 1.5 thi giam position size 50%
soft.major_news_avoid: Tranh mo position 30 phut truoc/sau FOMC, CPI, NFP
soft.btc_dominance_rule: BTC dominance > 60% thi uu tien BTC trade hon altcoin
soft.trend_persistence: Trong trending regime, doi pullback de entry tot hon
soft.correlation_check: Khong long ca BTC va ETH cung luc (correlation cao, 2x risk)
soft.alt_season_indicator: BTC dominance giam va ETH/BTC tang thi altcoin co the outperform
soft.eth_btc_lead_lag: ETH thuong follow BTC 5-15 phut. Neu BTC choppy, doi ETH settle
soft.low_cap_caution: SOL/BNB co volatility cao hon BTC 1.5-2x. Tang R:R toi thieu 1:1.5
soft.position_correlation: Toi da 2 positions cung chieu (long hoac short) de giam correlation risk
